LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT DARRYL MORGAN IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR THE PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00. THE REMAINDER OF THE MONEY HELD BY THE SHERIFF TO BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Darryl Morgan, Tel. No. 1-716-602-8640, Defendant appearing in pro per;
No other appearances on the matter.



RULING - HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT DARRYL MORGAN IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. The sheriff is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for the payment on the judgment in the amount of $300.00. The remainder of the money held by the Sheriff to be returned to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
